name: Parsnip Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the parsnips.
2. Boil the sliced parsnips in salted water until tender. Drain well.
3. Mash the cooked parsnips thoroughly.
4. Add flour, mace, melted butter, salt, and pepper to the mashed parsnips. Mix until combined.
5. Form the mixture into small, flat, round cakes.
6. Beat the large egg in a shallow dish.
7. Dip each cake first into the beaten egg, then coat with breadcrumbs.
8. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to frying temperature (about 350°F/175°C).
9. Carefully place the breadcrumb-coated parsnip cakes into the hot oil.
10. Fry until brown on both sides, turning once halfway through cooking.
11. Remove the cakes from the oil using tongs and allow them to drain on a paper towel-lined plate before serving.
